zh.lifeSummary: John Parsons是Giles Parsons和Fraunces Moore的兒子，於1611年出生。他於1659年12月29日與Joane Jane Lambe Deares在英國英格蘭倫敦斯特普尼結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1699年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州約克查爾斯 邱奇 本 查爾斯 帕里什享年88歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可洛瑟費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Parsons是Giles Parsons和Fraunces Moore的儿子，于1611年出生。他于1659年12月29日与Joane Jane Lambe Deares在英国英格兰倫敦斯特普尼结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1699年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州約克查爾斯 邱奇 本 查爾斯 帕里什享年88岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可洛瑟費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Parsons
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for the servant of a parish priest or parson, from the possessive case of Middle English persone, parsoun (see Parson ).

English: many early examples are found with the prepositions (e.g. Ralph del Persones 1323); these are habitational names, with the omission of house, hence in effect occupational names for servants employed at the parson's house.
English: post-medieval variant of Parson , with excrescent -s. Alternatively, Parson may be a shortened form of Parsons.

variants.name: Passon
meanings: Germanized form of Polish Pasoń or Pason, a derivative of pas ‘belt’. The Germanized form is found in both Poland and Germany.
English: perhaps an altered form of Parson; see Parsons . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Passons
meanings: English: probably an altered form of   Parsons  .

variants.name: Parson
meanings: English: status name or nickname from Middle English persone, persoun ‘priest, parson’ (Old French persone). The status of medieval bearers of the surname is uncertain. Priests were generally known by a habitational name rather than by a surname denoting their role in the church. They were not allowed to marry, but doubtless many had illegitimate children, some of whom may have been given Parson as a surname. Some of the original bearers may have been given it as a nickname (compare Priest , Bishop , Monk ) or it may have been an occupational name for someone who worked for the parson (a shortened form of Personesservaunt perhaps).
English: in northern England and the North Midlands especially, it is often a variant of   Pearson  . For the change in vowel compare   Parr  .
Americanized form of Swedish Pärsson, Pehrsson (see Pehrson ) or Persson , patronymics from vernacular shortened forms of the personal name Peter .

variants.name: Persons
meanings: Perhaps an Americanized form of Dutch Persoons, Persoens, a patronymic from Middle Dutch persoon ‘parson’, probably denoting the servant of a parish priest, or possibly an altered form of English Parsons .
English (Wiltshire and Yorkshire): variant of   Parsons  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: McPherson
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac a' Phearsain ‘son of the parson or priest’ (see Parsons ).

History: This is the name of a Highland Scottish clan, part of the Chattan confederation, the founder of which is believed to have been a man named Muireach or Murdo Cattenach, priest of Kingussie in Badenoch in the 9th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: John Parsons was born in 1611 as the son of Giles Parsons and Fraunces Moore. He married Joane Jane Lambe Deares on 29 December 1659, in Stepney, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1699, in Charles Church of Charles Parish, York, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 88, and was buried in Rotherfield, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: John Parsons est né en 1611, fils de Giles Parsons et Fraunces Moore. Il a épousé Joane Jane Lambe Deares le 29 décembre 1659, à Stepney, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1699, à Charles Church of Charles Parish, York, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterré à Rotherfield, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Parsonsは1611年にGiles ParsonsとFraunces Mooreの息子として生まれた。1659年12月29日にイギリスイギリスロンドンステプニーでJoane Jane Lambe Dearesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1699年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヨークチャーレス チャーチ オフ チャーレス パーイッシュで88歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスロスエルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Parsons(은)는 1611년 Giles Parsons(와)과 Fraunces Moore의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1659년 12월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스테p니에서 Joane Jane Lambe Deares(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1699년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 요르크 찰스 c후르치 프 찰스 파리시에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 로더필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Parsons nasceu em 1611 filho de Giles Parsons e Fraunces Moore. Ele casou-se com Joane Jane Lambe Deares em 29 de dezembro de 1659, em Stepney, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1699, em Charles Church of Charles Parish, York, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 88 anos, e foi sepultado em Rotherfield, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: John Parsons родился в 1611 г. Его родителей звали Giles Parsons и Fraunces Moore. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Jane Lambe Deares 29 декабря 1659 г. в местности степни, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1699 г. в местности чарльс чурч оф чарльс пэриш, ерк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 88 лет и был похоронен в местности ротирфиелд, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
